name: synthesize_image
description: Synthesize a single post image for one client via OpenAI gpt-image, from a prompt grounded in that post's actual sourced topic/claim (never a generic stock-photo-style image, and never an image that bakes in fabricated stats, quotes, or text unrelated to what post_draft.text actually says). Called by the ghostwriter specialist itself, inside the content-loop pipeline, only when post_brief.format == 'text+image'; the resulting asset_url is appended to post_draft.media_assets with source_tool: 'synthesize_image' so voice_qa's screenshot_and_gate-style inspection can trace the image back to this exact call. Fails clearly (fail-loud, non-retryable message, no silent placeholder/blank-image fallback) when OPENAI_API_KEY is unavailable or rejected.

client_id.description: Client this image belongs to; the join key threaded through to output, post_draft.media_assets, and fleet events. Never inferred — always passed through explicitly.

draft_id.description: post_draft.draft_id this image is being generated for, used for correlation between this tool call and the exact draft/retry it belongs to.

prompt.description: Image generation prompt, grounded in post_draft's actual sourced topic/claim (per ANTI-FABRICATION: the visual must not imply a stat, quote, or achievement that isn't claim_status: 'supported' in the underlying metrics_signal/trend_signal finding). Never a generic, unrelated prompt.

style_notes.description: Optional client-brand visual style hints sourced from ClientBrandMemory (e.g. palette/tone cues), if any exist for this client yet.

aspect_ratio.description: Target aspect ratio for the platform this image is destined for (X and LinkedIn post-image conventions). Defaults to '4:5' when omitted.

asset_url.description: URL of the synthesized image, suitable for direct use as a post_draft.media_assets[].asset_url entry.

error_message.description: Present only when status == 'error'; for a missing/rejected OPENAI_API_KEY this is a fail-loud, non-retryable message, never a silently degraded placeholder image.

usage.description: Rolls up into post_draft.usage, then ClientPipeline.usage, then the fleet-level total, per artifacts.md's usage-rollup rule.

cost_usd.description: OpenAI gpt-image billed cost for this single synthesis call.
